title: castanopsis neocavaleriei
intro: Castanopsis neocavaleriei, also known as the Chinese chestnut oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Castanopsis neocavaleriei include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and enhance immune system function. Castanopsis neocavaleriei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
